name: @appstrate/connect-test
displayName: Connect Test Agent — credential injection E2E
description: End-to-end harness for the declarative TwoStep connect integrations. Once @appstrate/connect-twostep-test (Bearer token) and @appstrate/connect-formlogin-test (session cookies) are connected, this agent calls each integration's api_call tool against its upstream /echo and reports the auth credential the proxy injected — proving the captured connect outputs are delivered on outbound calls while the agent never sees the secret.

twostep_authorization.description: The Authorization header value the TwoStep upstream echoed back (the injected Bearer token), or an error message.

formlogin_cookie.description: The Cookie header value the form-login upstream echoed back (the injected session cookies), or an error message.

secret_leaked.description: true if either echoed value contains the raw login password — must be false (the agent never holds the secret).
